title: Brain Fog in the Workplace: 8 Herbal Tinctures for Professionals
description: Rhodiola rosea tinctures may help with brain fog due to its adaptogenic properties. Rhodiola rosea contains constituents like rosavin, rosin, and salidroside, which help the body adapt to stress and promote mental clarity. These compounds work by increasing the production of neurotransmitters like serotonin and dopamine, and by improving blood flow to the brain.
